recap: Added empty-guard to bats_cleanup and default teardown() to helper
Added noBoilerplateTeardown lint rule detecting teardown() whose body is solely bats_cleanup
Removed boilerplate teardown() from 125 .bats files; rtk.bats non-trivial teardown preserved
Rewrote bats-test-path tests: removed dead ZDOTDIR hack, switched to bats_run_zsh + sandboxed file structure in BATS_TMP_DIR instead of testing against live repo paths
Fixed statusline tests: mock colors-load-definitions instead of recreating filesystem, removed bats_mock_oroshi_root
File already deleted in prior commit — scaffolding tests for completed palette renumbering, no dangling references
Quoted path values in projects-build jq template, fixed bats_run_zsh source call, aligned test expectation to literal tilde
Converted colors-build, filetypes-build, projects-build from shebang scripts to autoloaded functions; replaced THEMING_ROOT with OROSHI_ROOT; moved tests to domain __tests__ folders
